targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_predictions
FROM prediction_logs
WHERE predicted_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds};

SELECT
    to_timestamp(floor(predicted_at / 60) * 60) AS time,
    COUNT(*) AS prediction_count
  FROM prediction_logs
  WHERE predicted_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  GROUP BY 1
  ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
    to_timestamp(floor(predicted_at / 60) * 60) AS time,
    percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS latency_p50_ms,
    percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS latency_p95_ms
  FROM prediction_logs
  WHERE predicted_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  GROUP BY 1
  ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  runtime_slot,
  model_name,
  model_version,
  model_alias,
  model_run_id,
  threshold,
  COUNT(*) AS prediction_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE predicted_value = 1) AS predicted_fail_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE predicted_value = -1) AS predicted_pass_count,
  MIN(to_timestamp(predicted_at)) AS first_prediction_time,
  MAX(to_timestamp(predicted_at)) AS last_prediction_time
FROM prediction_logs
WHERE predicted_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
GROUP BY runtime_slot, model_name, model_version, model_alias, model_run_id, threshold
ORDER BY prediction_count DESC;

SELECT
  runtime_slot,
  target_alias,
  active_model_version,
  left(active_model_run_id, 8) AS active_run,
  active_threshold,
  previous_model_version,
  left(previous_model_run_id, 8) AS previous_run,
  previous_threshold,
  last_operation,
  to_timestamp(updated_at) AS updated_at
FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
ORDER BY CASE runtime_slot
  WHEN 'release' THEN 1
  WHEN 'canary' THEN 2
  WHEN 'shadow' THEN 3
  ELSE 9
END;

WITH evaluation_parameters AS (
  SELECT
    ${__from:date:seconds}::DOUBLE PRECISION AS window_start,
    ${__to:date:seconds}::DOUBLE PRECISION AS cutoff_time
),
decision_cohort AS (
  SELECT
    p.prediction_id,
    p.sample_id,
    p.model_run_id,
    p.threshold,
    p.serving_snapshot_id,
    p.snapshot_version,
    p.predicted_at
  FROM prediction_logs p
  CROSS JOIN evaluation_parameters e
  WHERE p.predicted_at >= e.window_start
    AND p.predicted_at < e.cutoff_time
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM prediction_logs earlier
      WHERE earlier.model_run_id = p.model_run_id
        AND earlier.threshold = p.threshold
        AND earlier.sample_id = p.sample_id
        AND earlier.serving_snapshot_id = p.serving_snapshot_id
        AND earlier.snapshot_version = p.snapshot_version
        AND (
          earlier.predicted_at < p.predicted_at
          OR (
            earlier.predicted_at = p.predicted_at
            AND earlier.prediction_id < p.prediction_id
          )
        )
    )
),
cohort_samples AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT sample_id
  FROM decision_cohort
),
first_label_arrivals AS (
  SELECT
    le.sample_id,
    MIN(le.available_at) AS first_label_available_at
  FROM label_events le
  JOIN cohort_samples c
    ON c.sample_id = le.sample_id
  CROSS JOIN evaluation_parameters e
  WHERE le.available_at <= e.cutoff_time
  GROUP BY le.sample_id
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_decisions,
  COUNT(f.sample_id) AS labeled_decisions,
  ROUND(
    COUNT(f.sample_id)::NUMERIC / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0),
    4
  ) AS label_coverage,
  ROUND(
    (
      percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (
        ORDER BY f.first_label_available_at - d.predicted_at
      ) FILTER (WHERE f.sample_id IS NOT NULL)
    )::NUMERIC,
    2
  ) AS first_label_lag_p50_seconds,
  ROUND(
    (
      percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (
        ORDER BY f.first_label_available_at - d.predicted_at
      ) FILTER (WHERE f.sample_id IS NOT NULL)
    )::NUMERIC,
    2
  ) AS first_label_lag_p95_seconds
FROM decision_cohort d
LEFT JOIN first_label_arrivals f
  ON f.sample_id = d.sample_id;

panels.title: Decision Label Coverage / First Label Lag

targets.rawSql:
WITH active_release AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
)
SELECT
  q.n_decisions,
  q.n_samples AS labeled_decisions,
  q.label_coverage,
  q.evaluation_status
FROM live_model_quality_evaluations q
JOIN active_release r
  ON q.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
 AND q.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
ORDER BY q.cutoff_time DESC, q.evaluation_id DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH active_release AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
)
SELECT
  q.fail_f1
FROM live_model_quality_evaluations q
JOIN active_release r
  ON q.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
 AND q.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
ORDER BY q.cutoff_time DESC, q.evaluation_id DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH active_release AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
)
SELECT
  to_timestamp(q.cutoff_time) AS time,
  'fail_f1' AS metric,
  q.fail_f1 AS value
FROM live_model_quality_evaluations q
JOIN active_release r
  ON q.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
 AND q.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
WHERE q.cutoff_time >= ${__from:date:seconds}
  AND q.cutoff_time < ${__to:date:seconds}
ORDER BY time;

WITH active_release AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
)
SELECT
  to_timestamp(q.cutoff_time) AS time,
  'fail_recall' AS metric,
  q.fail_recall AS value
FROM live_model_quality_evaluations q
JOIN active_release r
  ON q.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
 AND q.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
WHERE q.cutoff_time >= ${__from:date:seconds}
  AND q.cutoff_time < ${__to:date:seconds}
ORDER BY time;

panels.description: 각 점은 cutoff 시각 T에 계산된 Active Release의 슬라이딩 Recall입니다. 현재 설정에서는 [T-11분, T-1분)의 prediction을 사용합니다(10분 monitoring window, label maturity 60초). 평가 기준을 통과한 경우에만 Recall 값이 기록되며, Grafana 조회 시간 범위는 화면에 표시할 cutoff 시각만 선택합니다.
panels.title: Fail Recall - Active Release

targets.rawSql:
WITH active_release AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
)
SELECT
  to_timestamp(q.cutoff_time) AS time,
  'fail_precision' AS metric,
  q.fail_precision AS value
FROM live_model_quality_evaluations q
JOIN active_release r
  ON q.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
 AND q.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
WHERE q.cutoff_time >= ${__from:date:seconds}
  AND q.cutoff_time < ${__to:date:seconds}
ORDER BY time;

WITH active_release AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
)
SELECT
  q.evaluation_status,
  to_timestamp(q.cutoff_time) AS cutoff_time,
  to_timestamp(q.window_start) AS window_start,
  to_timestamp(q.window_end) AS window_end,
  q.label_maturity_seconds,
  q.monitoring_window_seconds,
  q.n_decisions,
  q.n_samples AS labeled_decisions,
  q.n_pass_samples,
  q.n_fail_samples,
  q.label_coverage,
  q.accuracy,
  q.fail_precision,
  q.fail_recall,
  q.fail_f1,
  q.fail_average_precision,
  q.model_run_id,
  q.threshold
FROM live_model_quality_evaluations q
JOIN active_release r
  ON q.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
 AND q.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
ORDER BY q.cutoff_time DESC, q.evaluation_id DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH active_release AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
),
latest_eval AS (
  SELECT q.*
  FROM live_model_quality_evaluations q
  JOIN active_release r
    ON q.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
   AND q.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
  ORDER BY q.cutoff_time DESC, q.evaluation_id DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT matrix.bucket, matrix.count
FROM latest_eval q
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
  VALUES
    (1, 'true_negative', q.true_negative),
    (2, 'false_positive', q.false_positive),
    (3, 'false_negative', q.false_negative),
    (4, 'true_positive', q.true_positive)
) AS matrix(sort_order, bucket, count)
ORDER BY matrix.sort_order;

SELECT
    to_timestamp(floor(predicted_at / 60) * 60) AS time,
    predicted_label AS metric,
    COUNT(*) AS value
  FROM prediction_logs
  WHERE predicted_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  GROUP BY 1, 2
  ORDER BY 1, 2;

WITH release_state AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold,
    previous_model_run_id,
    previous_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
),
active_latest AS (
  SELECT q.*
  FROM live_model_quality_evaluations q
  JOIN release_state r
    ON q.model_run_id = r.active_model_run_id
   AND q.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.active_threshold
  ORDER BY q.cutoff_time DESC, q.evaluation_id DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
previous_latest AS (
  SELECT q.*
  FROM live_model_quality_evaluations q
  JOIN release_state r
    ON q.model_run_id = r.previous_model_run_id
   AND q.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM r.previous_threshold
  WHERE r.previous_model_run_id IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY q.cutoff_time DESC, q.evaluation_id DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  metric.metric_name,
  metric.active_value,
  metric.previous_value,
  metric.active_value - metric.previous_value AS delta,
  a.evaluation_status AS active_status,
  p.evaluation_status AS previous_status,
  a.n_samples AS active_labeled_decisions,
  p.n_samples AS previous_labeled_decisions,
  a.n_fail_samples AS active_fail_samples,
  p.n_fail_samples AS previous_fail_samples,
  to_timestamp(a.cutoff_time) AS active_cutoff_time,
  to_timestamp(p.cutoff_time) AS previous_cutoff_time
FROM active_latest a
LEFT JOIN previous_latest p
  ON TRUE
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
  VALUES
    (1, 'fail_f1', a.fail_f1, p.fail_f1),
    (2, 'fail_recall', a.fail_recall, p.fail_recall),
    (3, 'fail_precision', a.fail_precision, p.fail_precision),
    (4, 'fail_average_precision', a.fail_average_precision, p.fail_average_precision),
    (5, 'accuracy', a.accuracy, p.accuracy)
) AS metric(sort_order, metric_name, active_value, previous_value)
ORDER BY metric.sort_order;

panels.title: Active vs Previous Release - Latest Delta

targets.rawSql:
WITH release_state AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold,
    previous_model_run_id,
    previous_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
    AND runtime_slot = 'release'
),
selected AS (
  SELECT
    active_model_run_id AS model_run_id,
    active_threshold AS threshold,
    'active' AS model_slot
  FROM release_state

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    previous_model_run_id AS model_run_id,
    previous_threshold AS threshold,
    'previous' AS model_slot
  FROM release_state
  WHERE previous_model_run_id IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  to_timestamp(q.cutoff_time) AS time,
  s.model_slot || ' / fail_f1' AS metric,
  q.fail_f1 AS value
FROM live_model_quality_evaluations q
JOIN selected s
  ON q.model_run_id = s.model_run_id
 AND q.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.threshold
WHERE q.cutoff_time >= ${__from:date:seconds}
  AND q.cutoff_time < ${__to:date:seconds}
ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Active vs Previous Release - F1 Trend

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
    SELECT evaluation_id
    FROM drift_metrics
    WHERE window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
      AND computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    ORDER BY computed_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
  SELECT
    d.reference_baseline_id AS baseline_id,
    b.baseline_name AS baseline,
    d.model_run_id AS run_id,
    d.threshold,
    d.window_minutes AS window_min,
    MAX(to_timestamp(d.computed_at)) AS computed_at,
    MAX(to_timestamp(d.current_start)) AS current_start,
    MAX(to_timestamp(d.current_end)) AS current_end,
    MAX(d.current_samples) AS current_n,
    MAX(d.baseline_samples) AS baseline_n,
    COUNT(*) AS metric_rows
  FROM drift_metrics d
  JOIN latest l
    ON l.evaluation_id = d.evaluation_id
  LEFT JOIN drift_reference_baselines b
    ON b.baseline_id = d.reference_baseline_id
  GROUP BY
    d.reference_baseline_id,
    b.baseline_name,
    d.model_run_id,
    d.threshold,
    d.window_minutes;

SELECT
    to_timestamp(computed_at) AS time,
    metric_name,
    delta_value AS value
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    AND window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'output'
    AND metric_name IN (
      'predicted_fail_ratio',
      'fail_probability_avg',
      'fail_probability_p50',
      'fail_probability_p95'
    )
  ORDER BY time, metric_name;

SELECT
    to_timestamp(computed_at) AS time,
    metric_name,
    delta_value AS value
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    AND window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'input'
    AND metric_name IN (
      'missing_count_avg',
      'missing_count_p95',
      'missing_count_max'
    )
  ORDER BY time, metric_name;

SELECT
    feature_name AS feature,
    ROUND(metric_value::numeric, 6) AS psi,
    baseline_samples AS baseline_n,
    current_samples AS current_n,
    to_timestamp(computed_at) AS computed_at
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE evaluation_id = (
    SELECT evaluation_id
    FROM drift_metrics
    WHERE window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
      AND metric_family = 'feature'
      AND metric_name = 'feature_psi'
      AND computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    ORDER BY computed_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
    AND window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'feature'
    AND metric_name = 'feature_psi'
  ORDER BY metric_value DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 30;

panels.description: Selected feature PSI history. Missing points mean the feature was not persisted in that evaluation's Top 30 PSI rows.

targets.rawSql:
WITH requested_features AS (
  SELECT unnest(ARRAY[${psi_feature:sqlstring}]::TEXT[]) AS feature_name
),
latest_top_feature AS (
  SELECT d.feature_name
  FROM drift_metrics d
  WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM requested_features r
    WHERE r.feature_name = '__latest_top__'
  )
    AND d.computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    AND d.window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
    AND d.metric_family = 'feature'
    AND d.metric_name = 'feature_psi'
  ORDER BY d.computed_at DESC, d.metric_value DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 1
),
selected_features AS (
  SELECT feature_name
  FROM requested_features
  WHERE feature_name <> '__latest_top__'

  UNION

  SELECT feature_name
  FROM latest_top_feature
),
evaluations AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    evaluation_id,
    computed_at,
    reference_baseline_id
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    AND window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
)
SELECT
  to_timestamp(e.computed_at) AS time,
  f.feature_name || ' / ' ||
    COALESCE(
      b.baseline_name || ' [' || left(e.reference_baseline_id, 8) || ']',
      'baseline=unknown'
    ) AS metric,
  d.metric_value::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM evaluations e
CROSS JOIN selected_features f
LEFT JOIN drift_metrics d
  ON d.evaluation_id = e.evaluation_id
 AND d.window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
 AND d.metric_family = 'feature'
 AND d.metric_name = 'feature_psi'
 AND d.feature_name = f.feature_name
LEFT JOIN drift_reference_baselines b
  ON b.baseline_id = e.reference_baseline_id
ORDER BY e.computed_at, metric;

panels.title: Fixed Reference Selected Feature PSI Trend

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    feature_name AS feature,
    ROUND(metric_value::numeric, 6) AS z_delta,
    ROUND(baseline_value::numeric, 6) AS baseline_mean,
    ROUND(current_value::numeric, 6) AS current_mean,
    ROUND(delta_value::numeric, 6) AS raw_delta,
    baseline_samples AS baseline_n,
    current_samples AS current_n,
    to_timestamp(computed_at) AS computed_at
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE evaluation_id = (
    SELECT evaluation_id
    FROM drift_metrics
    WHERE window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
      AND metric_family = 'feature'
      AND metric_name = 'feature_mean_standardized_delta'
      AND computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    ORDER BY computed_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
    AND window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'feature'
    AND metric_name = 'feature_mean_standardized_delta'
  ORDER BY metric_value DESC NULLS LAST

panels.title: Fixed Reference Top Feature Mean Shift

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    feature_name AS feature,
    ROUND(metric_value::numeric, 6) AS abs_delta,
    ROUND(baseline_value::numeric, 6) AS baseline_missing,
    ROUND(current_value::numeric, 6) AS current_missing,
    ROUND(delta_value::numeric, 6) AS signed_delta,
    baseline_samples AS baseline_n,
    current_samples AS current_n,
    to_timestamp(computed_at) AS computed_at
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE evaluation_id = (
    SELECT evaluation_id
    FROM drift_metrics
    WHERE window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
      AND metric_family = 'feature'
      AND metric_name = 'feature_missing_ratio_abs_delta'
      AND computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
    ORDER BY computed_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
    AND window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'feature'
    AND metric_name = 'feature_missing_ratio_abs_delta'
  ORDER BY metric_value DESC NULLS LAST
  LIMIT 30;

panels.title: Fixed Reference Top Feature Missing Shift
Drift / Data Quality - Recent vs Previous

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (window_type)
    window_type,
    evaluation_id,
    computed_at
  FROM drift_metrics
  ORDER BY window_type, computed_at DESC
)
SELECT
  d.window_type,
  d.metric_family,
  d.metric_name,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  MAX(to_timestamp(d.computed_at)) AS latest_computed_time,
  MAX(d.current_samples) AS current_samples,
  MAX(d.baseline_samples) AS baseline_samples
FROM drift_metrics d
JOIN latest l
  ON l.evaluation_id = d.evaluation_id
GROUP BY d.window_type, d.metric_family, d.metric_name
ORDER BY d.window_type, d.metric_family, d.metric_name;

SELECT
  to_timestamp(computed_at) AS time,
  metric_name,
  current_value AS value
FROM drift_metrics
WHERE computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  AND window_type = 'recent_vs_previous_time_window'
  AND metric_family = 'input'
  AND metric_name IN (
    'missing_count_avg',
    'missing_count_p95',
    'missing_count_max'
  )
ORDER BY time, metric_name;

SELECT
  to_timestamp(computed_at) AS time,
  metric_name,
  current_value AS value
FROM drift_metrics
WHERE computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  AND window_type = 'recent_vs_previous_time_window'
  AND metric_family = 'output'
  AND metric_name IN (
    'fail_probability_avg',
    'fail_probability_p50',
    'fail_probability_p95'
  )
ORDER BY time, metric_name;

SELECT
  feature_name,
  ROUND(metric_value::numeric, 6) AS abs_null_ratio_delta,
  ROUND(baseline_value::numeric, 6) AS baseline_null_ratio,
  ROUND(current_value::numeric, 6) AS current_null_ratio,
  ROUND(delta_value::numeric, 6) AS null_ratio_delta,
  baseline_samples,
  current_samples,
  to_timestamp(computed_at) AS computed_time
FROM drift_metrics
WHERE evaluation_id = (
  SELECT evaluation_id
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE window_type = 'recent_vs_previous_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'feature'
    AND metric_name = 'feature_missing_ratio_abs_delta'
    AND computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  ORDER BY computed_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
  AND window_type = 'recent_vs_previous_time_window'
  AND metric_family = 'feature'
  AND metric_name = 'feature_missing_ratio_abs_delta'
ORDER BY metric_value DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 30;

panels.title: Recent vs Previous Top Feature Missing Shift

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  feature_name,
  ROUND(metric_value::numeric, 6) AS standardized_mean_delta,
  ROUND(baseline_value::numeric, 6) AS baseline_mean,
  ROUND(current_value::numeric, 6) AS current_mean,
  ROUND(delta_value::numeric, 6) AS mean_delta,
  baseline_samples,
  current_samples,
  to_timestamp(computed_at) AS computed_time
FROM drift_metrics
WHERE evaluation_id = (
  SELECT evaluation_id
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE window_type = 'recent_vs_previous_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'feature'
    AND metric_name = 'feature_mean_standardized_delta'
    AND computed_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
  ORDER BY computed_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
  AND window_type = 'recent_vs_previous_time_window'
  AND metric_family = 'feature'
  AND metric_name = 'feature_mean_standardized_delta'
ORDER BY metric_value DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 30;

panels.title: Recent vs Previous Top Feature Mean Shift

targets.rawSql:
WITH selected_model AS (
  SELECT
    split_part('${model_run:raw}', '|', 1) AS model_run_id,
    NULLIF(split_part('${model_run:raw}', '|', 2), 'null')::DOUBLE PRECISION AS threshold
)
SELECT
  to_timestamp(q.cutoff_time) AS time,
  metric.metric_name AS metric,
  metric.metric_value AS value
FROM live_model_quality_evaluations q
JOIN selected_model s
  ON q.model_run_id = s.model_run_id
 AND q.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.threshold
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
  VALUES
    ('accuracy', q.accuracy),
    ('fail_precision', q.fail_precision),
    ('fail_recall', q.fail_recall),
    ('fail_f1', q.fail_f1),
    ('fail_average_precision', q.fail_average_precision)
) AS metric(metric_name, metric_value)
WHERE q.cutoff_time >= ${__from:date:seconds}
  AND q.cutoff_time < ${__to:date:seconds}
  AND metric.metric_name IN (${metric:sqlstring})
ORDER BY time, metric;

SELECT
  runtime_slot,
  model_run_id,
  threshold,
  COUNT(*) AS prediction_count,
  MIN(to_timestamp(predicted_at)) AS first_prediction_time,
  MAX(to_timestamp(predicted_at)) AS last_prediction_time
FROM prediction_logs
WHERE predicted_at BETWEEN ${__from:date:seconds} AND ${__to:date:seconds}
GROUP BY runtime_slot, model_run_id, threshold
ORDER BY prediction_count DESC;

WITH selected_model AS (
  SELECT
    split_part('${model_run:raw}', '|', 1) AS model_run_id,
    NULLIF(split_part('${model_run:raw}', '|', 2), 'null')::DOUBLE PRECISION AS threshold
)
SELECT
  q.evaluation_id,
  to_timestamp(q.cutoff_time) AS cutoff_time,
  to_timestamp(q.window_start) AS window_start,
  to_timestamp(q.window_end) AS window_end,
  q.label_maturity_seconds,
  q.monitoring_window_seconds,
  q.evaluation_status,
  q.n_decisions,
  q.n_samples AS labeled_decisions,
  q.label_coverage,
  q.n_pass_samples,
  q.n_fail_samples,
  q.accuracy,
  q.fail_precision,
  q.fail_recall,
  q.fail_f1,
  q.fail_average_precision,
  q.true_negative,
  q.false_positive,
  q.false_negative,
  q.true_positive
FROM live_model_quality_evaluations q
JOIN selected_model s
  ON q.model_run_id = s.model_run_id
 AND q.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.threshold
WHERE q.cutoff_time >= ${__from:date:seconds}
  AND q.cutoff_time < ${__to:date:seconds}
ORDER BY q.cutoff_time DESC, q.evaluation_id DESC
LIMIT 20;

panels.title: Live Sliding Evaluation Status - Selected Model

targets.rawSql:
WITH selected_model AS (
  SELECT
    split_part('${model_run:raw}', '|', 1) AS model_run_id,
    NULLIF(split_part('${model_run:raw}', '|', 2), 'null')::DOUBLE PRECISION AS threshold
)
SELECT
  to_timestamp(q.cutoff_time) AS time,
  q.accuracy,
  q.fail_precision,
  q.fail_recall,
  q.fail_f1,
  q.fail_average_precision
FROM live_model_quality_evaluations q
JOIN selected_model s
  ON q.model_run_id = s.model_run_id
 AND q.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.threshold
WHERE q.cutoff_time >= ${__from:date:seconds}
  AND q.cutoff_time < ${__to:date:seconds}
ORDER BY time;

panels.title: Live Sliding Quality Trend - Selected Model

targets.rawSql:
WITH selected_model AS (
  SELECT
    split_part('${model_run:raw}', '|', 1) AS model_run_id,
    NULLIF(split_part('${model_run:raw}', '|', 2), 'null')::DOUBLE PRECISION AS threshold
),
latest_eval AS (
  SELECT q.*
  FROM live_model_quality_evaluations q
  JOIN selected_model s
    ON q.model_run_id = s.model_run_id
   AND q.threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM s.threshold
  ORDER BY q.cutoff_time DESC, q.evaluation_id DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT matrix.bucket, matrix.count
FROM latest_eval q
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
  VALUES
    (1, 'true_negative', q.true_negative),
    (2, 'false_positive', q.false_positive),
    (3, 'false_negative', q.false_negative),
    (4, 'true_positive', q.true_positive)
) AS matrix(sort_order, bucket, count)
ORDER BY matrix.sort_order;

panels.title: Latest Live Confusion Matrix - Selected Model
Label Maturity / Fixed 10-Min Cohorts / Offline Training

panels.description: Latest six closed 10-minute cohorts. Only observable ages are drawn, so cumulative coverage never treats future ages as zero.

targets.rawSql:
WITH recent_cohorts AS (
  SELECT cohort_start
  FROM label_maturity_cohort_age_metrics
  WHERE maturity_scope = 'offline'
    AND cohort_closed = TRUE
  GROUP BY cohort_start
  ORDER BY cohort_start DESC
  LIMIT 6
),
cohort_points AS (
  SELECT
    m.*,
    MIN(m.age_minute) FILTER (
      WHERE m.is_observable = TRUE
        AND m.label_coverage >= 1.0
    ) OVER (
      PARTITION BY m.maturity_scope, m.cohort_start
    ) AS first_full_age
  FROM label_maturity_cohort_age_metrics m
  JOIN recent_cohorts r
    ON r.cohort_start = m.cohort_start
  WHERE m.maturity_scope = 'offline'
),
effective_points AS (
  SELECT
    p.*,
    CASE
      WHEN p.is_observable = TRUE THEN p.label_coverage
      WHEN p.first_full_age IS NOT NULL
        AND p.age_minute >= p.first_full_age THEN 1.0
      ELSE NULL
    END AS effective_coverage
  FROM cohort_points p
)
SELECT
  p.age_minute AS "Age (min)",
  p.effective_coverage::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "Coverage",
  to_char(to_timestamp(p.cohort_start) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'MM-DD HH24:MI')
    || '–' ||
  to_char(to_timestamp(p.cohort_end - 1.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') AS "Cohort"
FROM effective_points p
WHERE p.effective_coverage IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.cohort_start, p.age_minute;

panels.title: Offline Label Coverage Curves by Fixed Cohort

panels.description: Latest twelve offline cohorts, including open/observing cohorts. Final denominator and future ages remain NULL.

targets.rawSql:
WITH recent_cohorts AS (
  SELECT cohort_start
  FROM label_maturity_cohort_age_metrics
  WHERE maturity_scope = 'offline'
  GROUP BY cohort_start
  ORDER BY cohort_start DESC
  LIMIT 12
),
cohort_points AS (
  SELECT
    m.*,
    MIN(m.age_minute) FILTER (
      WHERE m.is_observable = TRUE
        AND m.label_coverage >= 1.0
    ) OVER (
      PARTITION BY m.maturity_scope, m.cohort_start
    ) AS first_full_age
  FROM label_maturity_cohort_age_metrics m
  JOIN recent_cohorts r
    ON r.cohort_start = m.cohort_start
  WHERE m.maturity_scope = 'offline'
),
effective_points AS (
  SELECT
    p.*,
    CASE
      WHEN p.is_observable = TRUE THEN p.label_coverage
      WHEN p.first_full_age IS NOT NULL
        AND p.age_minute >= p.first_full_age THEN 1.0
      ELSE NULL
    END AS effective_coverage
  FROM cohort_points p
)
SELECT
  to_char(to_timestamp(p.cohort_start) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'MM-DD HH24:MI')
    || '–' ||
  to_char(to_timestamp(MAX(p.cohort_end) - 1.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') AS "Cohort",
  MAX(p.cohort_status) AS "Status",
  MAX(p.cohort_size_seen_at_refresh) AS "Seen so far",
  MAX(p.cohort_size) AS "Samples",
  MAX(p.age_minute) FILTER (WHERE p.is_observable) AS "Observed through (min)",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 0))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "Coverage 0m",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 1))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "Coverage 1m",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 5))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "Coverage 5m",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 10))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "Coverage 10m",
  CASE
    WHEN MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 10) >= 1.0 THEN 0
    ELSE MAX(p.unlabeled_count) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 10)
  END AS "Unlabeled 10m"
FROM effective_points p
GROUP BY p.cohort_start
ORDER BY p.cohort_start DESC;

panels.title: Offline Fixed-Cohort Summary

panels.description: Rows are the latest fixed 10-minute cohorts, including the open cohort; columns are age 0–10 minutes. Future ages stay NULL.

targets.rawSql:
WITH recent_cohorts AS (
  SELECT cohort_start
  FROM label_maturity_cohort_age_metrics
  WHERE maturity_scope = 'offline'
  GROUP BY cohort_start
  ORDER BY cohort_start DESC
  LIMIT 12
),
cohort_points AS (
  SELECT
    m.*,
    MIN(m.age_minute) FILTER (
      WHERE m.is_observable = TRUE
        AND m.label_coverage >= 1.0
    ) OVER (
      PARTITION BY m.maturity_scope, m.cohort_start
    ) AS first_full_age
  FROM label_maturity_cohort_age_metrics m
  JOIN recent_cohorts r
    ON r.cohort_start = m.cohort_start
  WHERE m.maturity_scope = 'offline'
),
effective_points AS (
  SELECT
    p.*,
    CASE
      WHEN p.is_observable = TRUE THEN p.label_coverage
      WHEN p.first_full_age IS NOT NULL
        AND p.age_minute >= p.first_full_age THEN 1.0
      ELSE NULL
    END AS effective_coverage
  FROM cohort_points p
)
SELECT
  to_char(to_timestamp(p.cohort_start) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'MM-DD HH24:MI')
    || '–' ||
  to_char(to_timestamp(MAX(p.cohort_end) - 1.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') AS "Cohort",
  MAX(p.cohort_status) AS "Status",
  MAX(p.cohort_size_seen_at_refresh) AS "Seen",
  MAX(p.cohort_size) AS "Final N",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 0))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "0m",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 1))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "1m",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 2))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "2m",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 3))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "3m",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 4))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "4m",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 5))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "5m",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 6))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "6m",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 7))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "7m",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 8))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "8m",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 9))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "9m",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 10))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "10m"
FROM effective_points p
GROUP BY p.cohort_start
ORDER BY p.cohort_start DESC;

panels.title: Offline Cohort × Age Coverage Matrix
Label Maturity / Fixed 10-Min Cohorts / Serving Gate

panels.description: Latest six closed cohorts of canonical release predictions. Only observable ages are drawn; labels available before prediction count at age 0.

targets.rawSql:
WITH recent_cohorts AS (
  SELECT cohort_start
  FROM label_maturity_cohort_age_metrics
  WHERE maturity_scope = 'serving'
    AND cohort_closed = TRUE
  GROUP BY cohort_start
  ORDER BY cohort_start DESC
  LIMIT 6
),
cohort_points AS (
  SELECT
    m.*,
    MIN(m.age_minute) FILTER (
      WHERE m.is_observable = TRUE
        AND m.label_coverage >= 1.0
    ) OVER (
      PARTITION BY m.maturity_scope, m.cohort_start
    ) AS first_full_age
  FROM label_maturity_cohort_age_metrics m
  JOIN recent_cohorts r
    ON r.cohort_start = m.cohort_start
  WHERE m.maturity_scope = 'serving'
),
effective_points AS (
  SELECT
    p.*,
    CASE
      WHEN p.is_observable = TRUE THEN p.label_coverage
      WHEN p.first_full_age IS NOT NULL
        AND p.age_minute >= p.first_full_age THEN 1.0
      ELSE NULL
    END AS effective_coverage
  FROM cohort_points p
)
SELECT
  p.age_minute AS "Age (min)",
  p.effective_coverage::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "Coverage",
  to_char(to_timestamp(p.cohort_start) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'MM-DD HH24:MI')
    || '–' ||
  to_char(to_timestamp(p.cohort_end - 1.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') AS "Cohort"
FROM effective_points p
WHERE p.effective_coverage IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.cohort_start, p.age_minute;

panels.title: Serving Label Coverage Curves by Fixed Cohort

panels.description: Latest twelve serving cohorts, including open/observing cohorts. Canonicalization is per model run, threshold, sample and serving snapshot/version.

targets.rawSql:
WITH recent_cohorts AS (
  SELECT cohort_start
  FROM label_maturity_cohort_age_metrics
  WHERE maturity_scope = 'serving'
  GROUP BY cohort_start
  ORDER BY cohort_start DESC
  LIMIT 12
),
cohort_points AS (
  SELECT
    m.*,
    MIN(m.age_minute) FILTER (
      WHERE m.is_observable = TRUE
        AND m.label_coverage >= 1.0
    ) OVER (
      PARTITION BY m.maturity_scope, m.cohort_start
    ) AS first_full_age
  FROM label_maturity_cohort_age_metrics m
  JOIN recent_cohorts r
    ON r.cohort_start = m.cohort_start
  WHERE m.maturity_scope = 'serving'
),
effective_points AS (
  SELECT
    p.*,
    CASE
      WHEN p.is_observable = TRUE THEN p.label_coverage
      WHEN p.first_full_age IS NOT NULL
        AND p.age_minute >= p.first_full_age THEN 1.0
      ELSE NULL
    END AS effective_coverage
  FROM cohort_points p
)
SELECT
  to_char(to_timestamp(p.cohort_start) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'MM-DD HH24:MI')
    || '–' ||
  to_char(to_timestamp(MAX(p.cohort_end) - 1.0) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'HH24:MI') AS "Cohort",
  MAX(p.cohort_status) AS "Status",
  MAX(p.cohort_size_seen_at_refresh) AS "Seen so far",
  MAX(p.cohort_size) AS "Predictions",
  MAX(p.model_run_count) AS "Model runs",
  MAX(p.age_minute) FILTER (WHERE p.is_observable) AS "Observed through (min)",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 0))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "Coverage 0m",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 1))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "Coverage 1m",
  (MAX(p.effective_coverage) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 5))::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "Coverage 5m",

  CASE

    ELSE MAX(p.unlabeled_count) FILTER (WHERE p.age_minute = 10)
  END AS "Unlabeled 10m"
FROM effective_points p
GROUP BY p.cohort_start
ORDER BY p.cohort_start DESC;

panels.title: Serving Cohort × Age Coverage Matrix

list.definition:
WITH combos AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    model_run_id,
    threshold
  FROM live_model_quality_evaluations
),
runtime AS (
  SELECT
    runtime_slot,
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
),
annotated AS (
  SELECT
    c.model_run_id,
    c.threshold,
    string_agg(
      r.runtime_slot,
      ',' ORDER BY CASE r.runtime_slot
        WHEN 'release' THEN 1
        WHEN 'canary' THEN 2
        WHEN 'shadow' THEN 3
        ELSE 9
      END
    ) FILTER (WHERE r.runtime_slot IS NOT NULL) AS runtime_slots
  FROM combos c
  LEFT JOIN runtime r
    ON r.active_model_run_id = c.model_run_id
   AND r.active_threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM c.threshold
  GROUP BY c.model_run_id, c.threshold
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(
    runtime_slots || ' / run=' || left(model_run_id, 8) || ' / th=' || COALESCE(threshold::text, 'null'),
    'run=' || left(model_run_id, 8) || ' / th=' || COALESCE(threshold::text, 'null')
  ) AS __text,
  model_run_id || '|' || COALESCE(threshold::text, 'null') AS __value
FROM annotated
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN runtime_slots LIKE '%release%' THEN 0
    WHEN runtime_slots LIKE '%canary%' THEN 1
    WHEN runtime_slots LIKE '%shadow%' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  __text;
list.label: Live model run / threshold
list.name: model_run
list.query:
WITH combos AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    model_run_id,
    threshold
  FROM live_model_quality_evaluations
),
runtime AS (
  SELECT
    runtime_slot,
    active_model_run_id,
    active_threshold
  FROM model_runtime_deployment_state
  WHERE model_name = 'secom-fail-detector'
),
annotated AS (
  SELECT
    c.model_run_id,
    c.threshold,
    string_agg(
      r.runtime_slot,
      ',' ORDER BY CASE r.runtime_slot
        WHEN 'release' THEN 1
        WHEN 'canary' THEN 2
        WHEN 'shadow' THEN 3
        ELSE 9
      END
    ) FILTER (WHERE r.runtime_slot IS NOT NULL) AS runtime_slots
  FROM combos c
  LEFT JOIN runtime r
    ON r.active_model_run_id = c.model_run_id
   AND r.active_threshold IS NOT DISTINCT FROM c.threshold
  GROUP BY c.model_run_id, c.threshold
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(
    runtime_slots || ' / run=' || left(model_run_id, 8) || ' / th=' || COALESCE(threshold::text, 'null'),
    'run=' || left(model_run_id, 8) || ' / th=' || COALESCE(threshold::text, 'null')
  ) AS __text,
  model_run_id || '|' || COALESCE(threshold::text, 'null') AS __value
FROM annotated
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN runtime_slots LIKE '%release%' THEN 0
    WHEN runtime_slots LIKE '%canary%' THEN 1
    WHEN runtime_slots LIKE '%shadow%' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  __text;

list.definition:
SELECT
  option.__text,
  option.__value
FROM (
  SELECT
    0 AS sort_order,
    'Latest top feature'::TEXT AS __text,
    '__latest_top__'::TEXT AS __value

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    1 AS sort_order,
    feature_name AS __text,
    feature_name AS __value
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'feature'
    AND metric_name = 'feature_psi'
    AND feature_name IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY feature_name
) option
ORDER BY option.sort_order, option.__text;
list.label: PSI feature
list.name: psi_feature
list.query:
SELECT
  option.__text,
  option.__value
FROM (
  SELECT
    0 AS sort_order,
    'Latest top feature'::TEXT AS __text,
    '__latest_top__'::TEXT AS __value

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    1 AS sort_order,
    feature_name AS __text,
    feature_name AS __value
  FROM drift_metrics
  WHERE window_type = 'fixed_reference_time_window'
    AND metric_family = 'feature'
    AND metric_name = 'feature_psi'
    AND feature_name IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY feature_name
) option
ORDER BY option.sort_order, option.__text;
